v4.1 · consistency fixes
111 of 12 categories now have real Dulux photos (only AUTO is monogram)
2Photo zone uniform light-gray #fafbfc — no per-card tints
3All photos forced to max 110×110, object-fit contain, centred
4Hover scale subtle 1.05× on the photo only
5"Photo soon" amber ribbon removed (cleaner look)
6Coloured dots in info bar now match each tin's body colour
